description_for_human: Find restaurants near you with AI-optimized menus, dietary filters, and verified data.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to search for restaurants and retrieve structured menu data. The API returns Menu Protocol formatted data with explicit dietary boolean flags (vegan, vegetarian, gluten_free, halal, kosher, nut_free), allergen arrays, customization options, and cryptographic verification. Search by location (lat/lng required), cuisine type, dietary restrictions, and ADO (Agent Discovery Optimization) score. Higher ADO scores indicate better data quality and machine-readability. Always retrieve the full menu using get_menu after search to access item-level dietary information and allergens. Only verified restaurants appear in results.
